prompt_text:
### Demographics: 67-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 22 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after ophthalmology referral for suspected retinopathy
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
Simple Steatosis
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Osteoporosis (on bisphosphonate therapy)
Cholelithiasis (status post cholecystectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Simple Steatosis; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Losartan (50 mg daily), Nitrofurantoin (100 mg twice daily for prophylaxis), Alendronate (70 mg weekly), Calcium Carbonate 500 Mg + Cholecalciferol 1000 Iu (daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 88.3 kg; Height 166.9 cm; BMI 31.7 kg/m²; Blood pressure 144/85 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 6.8%; 9 months ago 6.9%; 6 months ago 6.4%; 3 months ago 6.3%; current 6.1%), FPG (12 months ago 134mg/dL; 9 months ago 142mg/dL; 6 months ago 128mg/dL; 3 months ago 121mg/dL; current 138mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 87.8kg; 9 months ago 88.8kg; 6 months ago 84.9kg; 3 months ago 86.7kg; current 88.3kg), Height (12 months ago 166.9cm; 9 months ago 166.9cm; 6 months ago 166.9cm; 3 months ago 166.9cm; current 166.9cm), BMI (12 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 31.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 31.0kg/m²; current 31.7kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 144mmHg; 9 months ago 142mmHg; 6 months ago 141mmHg; 3 months ago 144mmHg; current 144mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 82mmHg; 9 months ago 83mmHg; 6 months ago 85mmHg; 3 months ago 82mmHg; current 85mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 58U/L; 9 months ago 51U/L; 6 months ago 49U/L; 3 months ago 57U/L; current 53U/L), AST (12 months ago 53U/L; 9 months ago 48U/L; 6 months ago 46U/L; 3 months ago 54U/L; current 50U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.4mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.4mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.3mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.2mg/dL; current 1.2mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 36mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 35mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 39mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 37mL/min/1.73m²; current 36mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 87mg/g; 9 months ago 84mg/g; 6 months ago 60mg/g; 3 months ago 59mg/g; current 61mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 78mg/dL; 9 months ago 83mg/dL; 6 months ago 79mg/dL; 3 months ago 83mg/dL; current 81mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 42mg/dL; 9 months ago 39mg/dL; 6 months ago 38mg/dL; 3 months ago 39mg/dL; current 40mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 167mg/dL; 9 months ago 151mg/dL; 6 months ago 166mg/dL; 3 months ago 147mg/dL; current 157mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.2g/dL; 6 months ago 12.0g/dL; 3 months ago 12.0g/dL; current 12.1g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
